    "Spoil pile located within 2 ft of trench edge",
    "Minimum 2 ft setback not maintained per OSHA 1926.651(j)(1)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately move spoil pile to at least 2 ft from trench edge",
    "Inspect trench wall for signs of cracking or instability",
    "Barricade area until spoil is relocated"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926.651(j)(1) requires excavated material to be kept at least 2 ft from the edge of the excavation. The observed spoil pile is within 2 ft, creating a surcharge load that can cause trench wall collapse, endangering workers.",
